old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-oqv7.4","title":"Add nRF52840DK gateway Renode backend","description":"Add a target-specific recipe for nrf52840dk/nrf52840 gateway firmware, reusing the stock core and completed BLE model. This target intentionally operates as a BLE/CoAP gateway shell without LoRa.","acceptance_criteria":"Canonical gateway ELF boots under the recipe, reaches gateway main, BLE readiness and CoAP AUTOSTART, and completes one harness-driven local-client or GATT effect; physical BLE-central behavior remains a separate validation.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-16T19:40:35.380604Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-16T19:40:35.380604Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-oqv7.4","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-oqv7","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-16T19:40:35.499584Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-oqv7.4","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-oqv7.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-07-16T19:44:13.09554Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
